acute hospital Medicare payments, take this variable and add in the annual per diem payment amount

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: ACUTE_MDCR_PMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Starting in 2015, the CLM_PMT_AMT does not necessarily reflect the amount paid to the provider,
